## What & why
<!-- One or two lines. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Privacy checklist (required)
- [ ] No real account names, emails, brands, clients, domains or Drive IDs
- [ ] No `rclone.conf`, tokens, logs or real change CSVs
- [ ] Only `*.example.csv` / `*.schema.csv` templates are committed

## Quality checklist
- [ ] Scripts stay standard-library only and dry-run by default
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] Updated the relevant `docs/` page if behavior changed
